landing.heroDesc: Stop guessing. FitFast combines AI-powered plans with dedicated coaching to build your ideal physique and optimize your health.
landing.featuresDesc: We replaced generic templates with a dynamic intelligence engine that learns your body with every check-in.
landing.feat1Desc: Personalized meal plans with precise macros, ingredients, and step-by-step recipes tailored to your goals and dietary needs.
landing.feat2Desc: 14-day workout programs that evolve with your progress. Every check-in recalibrates your next training cycle.
landing.feat3Desc: AI builds your plans, your coach fine-tunes them. Direct access to your coach through the in-app ticket system.
landing.checkInDesc: Every 14 days, submit your weight, measurements, photos, and performance data. The AI uses it all to rebuild your next cycle.
landing.coachAccessDesc: Direct support via in-app tickets. Ask questions, report issues, get guidance.
landing.progressTrackingDesc: Weight trends, progress photos, daily tracking — all in one place.
landing.pricingDesc: Choose the plan that fits your ambition.
landing.plansComing: Pricing plans coming soon. Check back shortly.
landing.ctaDesc: Join athletes and high-performers building their best bodies with FitFast.
landing.footerDesc: AI-powered fitness and nutrition coaching, personalized to your body and your goals.

checkout.dragDrop: Drag & drop your payment screenshot here, or click to browse
checkout.tapUpload: Tap to upload your payment screenshot
checkout.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
checkout.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
checkout.invalidFileType: Please upload an image file (PNG, JPG, WEBP).

confirmation.title: Signup Submitted Successfully!
confirmation.subtitle: Check your email to complete your account setup
confirmation.explanation: We've sent you an email with a link to set your password. After setting up your account, your payment will be reviewed by the coach.
